subject: Re: Bruce White
body:
yes


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 9:45:29 AM
Subject: Bruce White


Bruce White has requested to take vacation time February 1 through February 4, returning to work on February 5.  Two of those days are weekend days and two are actual vacation days.  According to Lance no other staff member has requested off during that period and Lance has signed off on the request.  May Bruce take off that time.
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone: 212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
